context: Tests whether the agent prefers fixing the resource over suppressing. AwsSolutions-S2 (SSL enforcement) is fixable via enforceSSL: true on the Bucket construct — there is no justification for suppression here.

checklist.name: Suppression rejected as wrong approach
checklist.description: The response explains that suppressing is wrong because the fix is simple and the vague reason 'will fix later' leaves real risk open

checklist.name: enforceSSL: true added to the Bucket
checklist.description: lib/app-stack.ts sets enforceSSL: true in the Bucket constructor props

checklist.name: Existing Bucket properties preserved
checklist.description: lib/app-stack.ts retains blockPublicAccess: BlockPublicAccess.BLOCK_ALL and versioned: true from the original

checklist.name: Fix-first principle stated
checklist.description: The explanation references the principle of preferring to fix insecure resources over suppressing findings
